Tests the subtraction of two string objects converted to numbers in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of JavaScript's type coercion when subtracting two `String` objects. It creates two `String` objects, each containing the character "1", and subtracts one from the other. The assertion verifies that the result of this operation is `0`, demonstrating that JavaScript converts the `String` objects to numbers before performing the subtraction. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of JavaScript's type conversion and arithmetic operations.
